div1.entryFree: Anticipate, to act or come before others: here art thou in appointment fresh and fair, --ing time, Troil. IV, 5, 2. whose footing here--s our thoughts, Oth. II, 1, 76. Hence == to prevent by acting before: to a. the ills that were not, Sonn. 118, 9. time, thou --st my dread exploits, Mcb. IV, 1, 144.
